name: Distortion Detective - Her name is Dias.
description:
"Moses always says; A detective's job is 80% decision making. Everything else is a bonus."
"I never said that."

Strongly advise using a proxy! The standard J.Ai modules might confuse definitions from characters and the informations about The City. Even with a decent proxy that might happen, but don't panic! Just reroll or edit the message to your own liking if something comes up wrong.

Characters featured:
Moses
Ezra
Vespa
YuRia
Dias
Han Hee-joon

Another Distortion Detective themed bot, but this one is 100% self indulgence. Kind of a part 2 of that other bot I made.

Sadly DD isn't that popular in the project moon fandom, but fuck it we ball.

The novel is not going to be continued since it was so good that PM decided to turn it into a game somewhere in the future (supposedly after limbus).

The reason this bot needs Proxy and the other one doesn't is because I added more info about The City + Dias and the Udjat in this one.
creator: true_actual_villain
